message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Betriebs-Panel Nordrhein-Westfalen, Welle 1-8, 1993-2000","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3802","justification":"Establishment panel survey of firms in North Rhine-Westphalia in the 1990s; focuses on business organization, management practices, and employment dynamics in an industrial region. Relevant to business/industrial management and limited to one of the specified federal states during the 1990s."},{"title":"Mannheimer Innovationspanel – Innovationserhebung in der Industrie in Rheinland-Pfalz 1992/93","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA2605","justification":"Innovation survey of industrial firms in Rhineland-Palatinate in 1992/93; covers organizational innovation, R&D management, and industrial structures at the state level. Fits business/industrial management and is specific to Rhineland-Palatinate in the early 1990s."},{"title":"Betriebsräte und betriebliche Organisation in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1994","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3061","justification":"Survey on works councils, workplace organization, and management–employee relations in establishments in North Rhine-Westphalia in 1994; directly about business/industrial organization within one of the requested states during the 1990s."},{"title":"Betriebliche Reorganisation und Mitbestimmung in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1996","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3116","justification":"Study of restructuring, reorganization, and co-determination in firms in North Rhine-Westphalia in 1996; focuses on management decisions, organizational change, and industrial relations at state level in the 1990s."},{"title":"Innovationsverhalten kleiner und mittlerer Unternehmen in Rheinland-Pfalz 1995","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3274","justification":"Survey of small and medium-sized enterprises in Rhineland-Palatinate on innovation behavior, management of innovation projects, and organizational structures in 1995; matches business/industrial management topic and the specified region/time."},{"title":"Standortentscheidungen und Betriebsorganisation im Verarbeitenden Gewerbe Nordrhein-Westfalens 1992","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA2451","justification":"Study of location decisions and internal organizational structures of manufacturing firms in North Rhine-Westphalia in 1992; explicitly about business/industrial organization in one of the requested states during the 1990s."},{"title":"Technologischer Wandel und betriebliche Organisation in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1998","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3359","justification":"Examines how technological change affects company organization, management practices, and work organization in industrial firms located in North Rhine-Westphalia in 1998; clearly tied to business/industrial management in the requested region/timeframe."},{"title":"Industriebetriebe in Rheinland-Pfalz: Organisation, Management und Beschäftigung 1990","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA2207","justification":"Survey of industrial establishments in Rhineland-Palatinate in 1990 focusing on organizational structure, management strategies, and employment; directly relevant to industrial management and limited to one of the target states at the start of the 1990s."},{"title":"Betriebliche Modernisierung in der Chemieindustrie Rheinland-Pfalz und Nordrhein-Westfalen 1993","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA2614","justification":"Covers organizational modernization, management strategies, and work organization in chemical industry plants in both Rhineland-Palatinate and North Rhine-Westphalia in 1993; spans both requested states and focuses on industrial management/organization in the 1990s."},{"title":"Unternehmensführung und Personalpolitik in mittleren Industriebetrieben Nordrhein-Westfalens 1997","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3442","justification":"Study of corporate management and personnel policy in medium-sized industrial firms in North Rhine-Westphalia in 1997; relates directly to business/industrial management and organization in one of the specified states within the 1990s."}]}
